name: Poke ALL Toads
short_description: A puzzle game starring mischievous fairies. Complete levels by working as a team, operating dangerous machinery and manipulating local wildlife.
detailed_description:
A light-hearted game about mischief where you guide a band of fairies with a simple goal.


However toads don't like being poked and will not sit idle after the offense. Use the unique abilities of each fairy to get the upper hand or even turn the toads attack into your advantage. Protecting the blue fairy is all you need to worry about.

This is a puzzle game that puts its cartoony art as one of the main protagonists. Watch your fairies run around the world, sleep in inappropriate places, react to the environment or get flung into the air.

The game features over 100 levels in vibrant worlds, each one introducing new mysterious contraptions and tricky toad varieties. Learn how they work through observation and experimentation.

Learning, as well as getting punished by your actions, is part of the fun.

reviews.review_text:
I CAN'T DIE IN THIS DISGUSTING FROG ITS SO GROSS AND ONLY LIVES A FEW YEARS IVE BEEN ALIVE FOR CENTURIES THIS CAN'T HAPPEN TO ME PLEASE PLEASE DON'T LET THIS HAPPEN TO ME

Holy ♥♥♥♥, holy God, this was so ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ hot. Jesus christ. Oh, just the THOUGHT of her cute fairy life being snuffed out. God ♥♥♥♥, what do you think her final thoughts were? Do you think she ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ and ♥♥♥♥ herself in her final moments, realizing her cute, innocent fairy life was coming to an end? I wonder if she shrieked in terror as she realized her entire life built to this sad, pathetic moment, and died in pure, unadulterated agony as she was dissolved by acids, thrashing in ungodly pain until her last moments.


Nah just kidding, it's nonlethal. Great puzzle game btw, congrats on the release

Very charming art, each fairy has tons of personality including taunts, cheering victory, or even mocking mistakes.  Puzzles make sense with well defined rules.  Any level is passable if it doesn't click.  Some puzzles require quick timing but pauses on fairy switch make it forgiving.

A simple yet well thought out puzzle game about poking toads and getting away with it.
Solutions are rarely complicated sequences or based on tight timing. It's all simple "how did I not think of that before" eurekas.
Save for some real brainteaser bonus levels it's overall beginner friendly, you definitely feel smart for finding the solutions but it doesn't often take longer than a minute or two. 
The style of the game and the animations of the fairies and toads are really charming.
What a nice little gem this is.
Fun puzzles (usually), good music, cute fairies.  Worth a poke.
